name: case07_column_update_job
description: Case 07: Schema evolution - S3 pipe-delimited source handling old/new schema versions to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1": {"S3CsvSource": {"AdditionalOptions": {"EnableSamplePath": false, "SamplePath": ""}, "Escaper": "\\", "Exclusions": [], "Name": "S3 CSV Source - case07_column_update", "OptimizePerformance": false, "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "Paths": ["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case07_column_update/"], "QuoteChar": "quote", "Recurse": true, "Separator": "pipe", "WithHeader": true}}, "node-2": {"SparkSQL": {"Inputs": ["node-1"], "Name": "SQL Query", "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": []}], "SqlAliases": [{"Alias": "myDataSource", "From": "node-1"}], "SqlQuery": "SELECT NULLIF(TRIM(AS_OF_DATE), '') AS AS_OF_DATE, NULLIF(TRIM(CID), '') AS CID, NULLIF(TRIM(CTRCT), '') AS CTRCT, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(COLL_NUMBER), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(COLL), '')) AS COLL_NUMBER, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(CTRCT_PLDGAMT), '') AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS CTRCT_PLDGAMT, NULLIF(TRIM(COLTYP), '') AS COLTYP, NULLIF(TRIM(COLTYP_NAME), '') AS COLTYP_NAME, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(COL_PLDGAMT), '') AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS COL_PLDGAMT, NULLIF(TRIM(CTRSTAT), '') AS CTRSTAT, NULLIF(TRIM(CTRSTAT_NAME), '') AS CTRSTAT_NAME, NULLIF(TRIM(CTRCOL_STAT), '') AS CTRCOL_STAT, NULLIF(TRIM(CTRCOL_STAT_NAME), '') AS CTRCOL_STAT_NAME, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(TOTAL_COL), '') AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS TOTAL_COL, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(VERSION_DATE), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS VERSION_DATE, TO_TIMESTAMP(REPLACE(NULLIF(TRIM(ETL_UPDATE_DATE), ''), 'T', ' '), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONTRACT_DATE), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS CONTRACT_DATE, NULLIF(TRIM(COLL_NAME), '') AS COLL_NAME, NULLIF(TRIM(COLL_ADDRESS), '') AS COLL_ADDRESS FROM myDataSource WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(CID), '') IS NOT NULL"}}, "node-3": {"S3DirectTarget": {"AutoDataQuality": {"IsEnabled": false}, "Compression": "gzip", "Format": "csv", "Inputs": ["node-2"], "Name": "S3 Gzip CSV Target - case07_column_update", "NumberTargetPartitions": "0", "PartitionKeys": [], "Path": "s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case07_column_update/load/", "SchemaChangePolicy": {"EnableUpdateCatalog": false}}}}
